title: Sophisticated Planning Under Partial Observability

runtime.expected_outcome: Under noisy A, sophisticated planning still finds the detour because its recursive min considers the best follow-up given each possible observation.

symbols.G_soph(pi_{t+1}|o_t): sophisticated EFE conditioned on the imagined obs

audiences.kid: The agent imagines what it might see, then figures out the best next plan for each case, then picks what to do now.
audiences.real: Under partial observability, sophisticated planning conditions its lookahead on imagined observations, giving robust plans even when the agent is currently uncertain.
audiences.equation: Recursion is over (pi_t, o_t) pairs: for each imagined o_t, pick the best pi_{t+1}. Average over q(o_t|pi_t).
audiences.derivation: Belief-MDP formulation of the POMDP: the agent plans over beliefs, not states. Sophisticated EFE is the information-theoretic analog of POMDP value iteration (Kaelbling et al. 1998; Friston et al. 2021).

orchestrate.objective: Show sophisticated planning's robustness under partial observability.
orchestrate.context: deceptive_dead_end with noisy A (lower precision); run SophisticatedPlan with depth=4.

credits: Parr, Pezzulo & Friston (2022), Active Inference, MIT Press (CC BY-NC-ND), App B.
Kaelbling, Littman & Cassandra (1998), Planning and acting in partially observable stochastic domains.
